commit_scope: Add an observed form-cli model-lane gap receipt that distinguishes the locally proven tokenizer, GGUF map, and autoregressive-loop surfaces from the still-pending ask-staged model call.

observed_outputs: make wellness -> specs/INDEX.md aligned after regeneration; deploy aligned; kernel-native surface breathing.
gguf_weight_map_receipt.py -> verdict=pass; llama GGUF v3; 255 tensors; 27 metadata KVs; tensor ranges within file; aligned offsets; tokenizer arrays present.
tokenizer_carrier -> partial: BPE tokenizer composition and Llama 3 pre-tokenizer bands pass; full Llama 3 vocab/merge table is not yet bound to ask-staged.
full_gguf_weight_map -> pass: full real GGUF metadata and tensor map receipt observed.
autoregressive_loop_binding -> observed-not-ask-bound: Form llama-generate band passes and Metal GQA decode loop is bit-for-bit equivalent to full causal recompute.
ask_staged_model_call -> pending: ask-staged returns local RAG miss for an ungrounded probe and does not call a hidden HTTP/Ollama/local decoder.
scripts/validate_form_cli_local_receipts.sh substrate -> PASS: local grounded ask and pending synthesis receipts are honest.
bin/form-cli preflight -> 9 passed, 0 gaps, READY; prose synthesis remains an honest pending lane.

deploy_validation.notes: No public runtime deploy needed for the local receipt scripts before PR merge; public verification follows merge if deployment moves.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof passed; rebase, guard, PR, CI, merge, and deploy verification remain.

evidence_refs: The new GGUF receipt walks a real local multi-GB GGUF with file seeking, not full weight loading, and records tensor byte ranges from the complete tensor-info table.

The new form-cli model-gap receipt runs the tokenizer composition band, Llama 3 pre-tokenizer band, real GGUF map witness, Form autoregressive generation band, Metal GQA autoregressive decode witness, and an ask-staged local-only probe.
The receipt intentionally preserves ask-staged-model-call as pending because the native ask-staged path still returns grounded RAG or local miss only.
scripts/INDEX.md, specs/INDEX.md, and MANIFEST.md were regenerated so the new scripts and previously stale spec count are visible in the repo maps.
